metadata.title: The Clocktower Riddle
metadata.author: AdventureKit
metadata.summary: A mysterious exploration prototype with item discovery, atmospheric choices, and a clockwork puzzle hook.

items.name: Brass Winder
items.description: A palm-sized winding key with teeth worn smooth by many hands.

items.name: Ink-Spattered Map
items.description: A map showing the clocktower stairs and three marked bell chambers.

items.name: Blue Lantern
items.description: A lantern that glows only when the tower bells are near alignment.

scenes.title: Moonlit Square
scenes.background: An empty old-town square under a clocktower whose hands point to different hours.

blocks.text: Every window in the square is dark except the clocktower face, which burns blue at midnight.

blocks.speaker: Ilen
blocks.text: The town stopped at twelve. The riddle says the tower starts again when someone remembers the missing hour.

scenes.title: Fountain Cache
scenes.background: A cracked fountain basin filled with dry leaves and a hidden brass glint.

blocks.text: Under the leaves rests a brass winder, warm despite the cold square.

blocks.speaker: Ilen
blocks.text: A key without a lock means the lock is pretending to be something else.

scenes.title: Tower Stairs
scenes.background: A spiral stairwell with bell ropes descending like black threads.

blocks.text: The steps count upward, but the tower shadows count down.

blocks.speaker: Ilen
blocks.text: Listen. One bell is late, one is early, and one is lying.

choices.label: Take the blue lantern from the hook

scenes.title: Bell Chamber
scenes.background: Three silent bells hang over a clockwork floor etched with moons and hour marks.

blocks.text: The brass winder fits into the floor, not the clock. The whole chamber waits to turn.

hook.notes: Future module can mount a rotational ring puzzle where the player aligns bell tones with the missing hour.

choices.label: Set the winder into the clockwork floor

scenes.title: Wrong Chime
scenes.background: The chamber rings once, far too loud, and dust falls like gray rain.

blocks.text: The tower accepts the attempt, then rejects it with a chime that sends shadows racing downstairs.

choices.label: Use the map to reset the bells

scenes.title: Hidden Hour
scenes.background: A thirteenth hour opens behind the clock face, full of soft blue dust and suspended rain.

blocks.speaker: Ilen
blocks.text: It was not a missing hour. It was a hidden one.
The tower begins to move, not forward, but honestly.

choices.label: Let the square hear the hidden hour
Close the chamber and keep the hour safe

endings.title: The Tower Restored
endings.summary: The bells align and the town hears the hour it forgot, waking into motion under blue dawn.

endings.title: The Secret Kept
endings.summary: The tower keeps its hidden hour, and only the lantern remembers how close the town came to waking.

endings.title: Square Unchanged
endings.summary: The tower settles back into silence, but the wrong chime leaves a new crack in the moonlit square.
